name: Moso Power Supply Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: MOSO Power Supply Technology Co., Ltd. provides power supply solutions in China and internationally. The company offers LED drivers, such as road, industrial, and landscape lighting solutions; and switch power supply products comprising wall plugs, desktops, and bare boards. It also provides photovoltaic products, including single-phase, two-phase, and three-phase string inverters; and charging piles. MOSO Power Supply Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
